values.content:
Analyze this food image and provide detailed nutritional information.

For each food item visible in the image:
1. Food name and estimated portion size
2. Calories (kcal)
3. Protein (g)
4. Carbs (g)
5. Fat (g)
6. Sugar (g)
7. Fiber (g)

Also provide:
- Total meal summary
- Meal type estimation (breakfast/lunch/dinner/snack)
- Health rating (1-5 stars)
- Sugar alert if high sugar content
- Healthier alternatives if applicable

Respond in this JSON format:
{
  "meal_type": "lunch",
  "items": [
    {"name": "Dal Rice", "portion": "1 bowl", "calories": 350, "protein": 12, "carbs": 55, "fat": 8, "sugar": 3, "fiber": 6}
  ],
  "totals": {"calories": 650, "protein": 22, "carbs": 85, "fat": 18, "sugar": 8, "fiber": 10},
  "health_rating": 4,
  "notes": "Good balanced meal with adequate protein"
}
